# Kosher Culinary Camp 2026

Kosher Culinary Camp is a one-week Jewish summer day camp in Southern Delaware hosted by Chabad of Southern Delaware in Lewes, DE.

## Primary Page

https://shliachflow.github.io/chabad-southern-delaware-camp/

## What It Is

- Jewish summer day camp in Southern Delaware
- Kosher cooking and baking camp for children
- Hosted by Chabad of Southern Delaware
- Designed for children ages 4-12
- Includes kosher cooking, challah baking, almost daily trips, water play, and Jewish values

## Dates, Hours, And Pricing

- Dates: August 3-7, 2026
- Days: Monday-Friday
- Hours: 9:00 AM-3:00 PM
- Early bird price: $250 per child
- Regular price: $300 per child

## Location And Service Area

- Public location: Chabad of Southern Delaware, Lewes, DE
- Serves families in Lewes, Rehoboth Beach, Milton, Georgetown, Sussex County, and Southern Delaware

## Registration

Registration page: https://shliachflow.github.io/chabad-southern-delaware-camp/register.html

Contact Chanale Vogel:

- Phone: 718-473-6570
- Email: Chanale@JewishSouthernDelaware.com

## Photo Albums

Photo albums page: https://shliachflow.github.io/chabad-southern-delaware-camp/photos.html

Photo albums are managed through Pages CMS in `content/gallery.json`.

## Organization

Chabad of Southern Delaware

- Website: https://www.jewishsoutherndelaware.com
- Email: Rabbi@JewishSouthernDelaware.com
- Phone: (302) 377-1162
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/chabadsoutherndelaware/
